subcodes.first_line: A remembrance unto him who hath turned toward the Countenance and set his face toward the Qiblih of all who dwell in earth and heaven, that he may hearken unto the Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری لمن توجه الی الوجه و اقبل الی قبله من فی الارضین و السموات لیسمع ندآء
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
